gcast_usage: Reply to a message to broadcast.
help_menu: eXuCoDeR Music Bot Help Click the buttons below to explore commands. All commands can be used with /
help_admins: Admin Commands /pause - Pause playback /resume - Resume playback /skip - Skip current track /stop - Stop playback /seek [seconds] - Seek position /seekback [seconds] - Seek backward /reload - Refresh admin cache
help_auth: Auth Commands Authorized users can control playback without being admins. /auth [user] - Authorize user /unauth [user] - Unauthorize user
help_blist: Blacklist Commands Blacklisted users/chats cannot use the bot. /blacklist [id] - Blacklist /unblacklist [id] - Unblacklist
help_ping: Utility Commands /help - Show this menu /ping - Check bot status /start - Start the bot /sudolist - List sudo users /stats - Show bot statistics
help_play: Play Commands /play [song/URL] - Play audio /vplay [song/URL] - Play video -f flag: Force play (skip queue) -v flag: Video mode Example: /play -f -v song name
help_stats: Stats Commands /stats - Show bot statistics /active - Show active streams
help_sudo: Sudo Commands /ac - Active calls count /activevc - Active streams list /broadcast - Broadcast message /eval - Execute Python code /logs - Get log file /restart - Restart bot /addsudo - Add sudo user /rmsudo - Remove sudo user
